features.title: Not lost, now it's time to find the path with AI!

startup.title: Want your own startup or high salary?
startup.description: Want to build your own startup or get a high-paying tech job—but don't know where to start? Learn how to build professional apps without a computer science degree.

income.title: Income not increasing?
income.description: Working hour after hour but income not increasing? Want to provide design and development services that will bring 5 times more value? Discover how to run a full agency alone using AI.

ai.title: Will AI replace you?
ai.description: Love creative work, but afraid AI will replace you? Want to learn UI/UX but it seems difficult? Master those specific tools and skills that will make you truly invincible and irreplaceable.

benefits.badge: Why should you attend this webinar?
benefits.title: Because your dream also needs to be smart like AI now!
benefits.subtitle: AI is not scaring you, you haven't lost your way either, you just haven't gotten the right guide yet.
benefits.heading: This webinar will show you
items: A clear roadmap for smart work in UI/UX design with AI.
Real and simple strategies to make design 2x faster.
Standing out in the job and freelancing market by building a portfolio.
benefits.cta: Let your career's turning point begin now - Join the webinar and prove yourself!

testimonials.badge: Their success is not a story... it's proof
testimonials.title: They dreamed... just like you are now!
testimonials.subtitle: Where you stand today, they were once there too. The only difference was one thing—they started learning, following the right guidelines, with AI by their side.
testimonials.quote: UIMC showed me the AI-driven design aspect so simply that I got clarity at every step from building a portfolio to getting a job.
testimonials.cta: Let the next name in the success story be yours! Book your seat in the webinar now!

pricing.title: Where I stand... its beginning was from exactly your place!
pricing.subtitle: I am Shahriar Sultan, I design, I teach, and I guide the way.
pricing.heading: My brief introduction
credentials: Head of Design at Niyyah (London-based EdTech platform)
Senior Product Designer at Karaz Care (Saudi Arabia's Largest HealthTech platform)
Founder & CEO at LumixelStudio, a digital design and no-code development agency.
Founder & Mentor at UI Design Marathon Course (UIMC) my very success course ever!

investment.title: Investment in yourself is the most profitable investment
investment.subtitle: Now is the time to invest in yourself, to take your skills several steps forward. So what's the delay?

faq.title: Where are the biggest fears when learning design with AI?
faq.subtitle: Every day countless students get stuck in the same thoughts. Questions in mind, doubts in heart, no courage to start... Are you also getting lost in this crowd of questions?

aiFear.title: Fear about AI
questions: Will I fall behind as a designer if I use AI?
Does design with AI really look professional?

questions: Which projects work best for building a portfolio?

career.title: Doubts about career
questions: What do clients or companies actually want from UI/UX designers?

Is it possible to scale income with AI without skills?

faq.cta: Don't keep questions in your mind, register for the webinar now to find answers!
